data.broker_brief: Fishwife is a premium tinned seafood brand known for sustainably sourced products with bold branding. Strong DTC velocity with growing specialty retail presence.

data.email_subject: Fishwife — premium tinned fish that your seafood buyer will love
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

I'm reaching out about Fishwife — one of the most culturally resonant food brands I've come across in years, and one I think is a natural fit for the Whole Foods customer.

Fishwife is cofounded by Becca Millstein and has helped spark the premium tinned fish renaissance. Here's what stands out:

• 92K+ Instagram followers — driving real consumer demand into stores
• 820 Amazon reviews at 4.6★ — proven online velocity
• MSC-certified sustainable seafood at $12.99 SRP
• Already in Whole Foods nationally — this is about deepening regional placement
• Strong specialty press: Bon Appétit, NYT Food, Eater named them a brand to watch

The brand has a clear whitespace opportunity in your region. The tinned fish set is an underserved premium category and Fishwife's packaging and storytelling make it an easy yes for educated buyers.

I've been working with their team on regional expansion and have velocity data from comparable markets I'd love to share. Available for a quick call this week?

Best,
[Your name]
Independent Food Broker | [Territory]

With 92K+ Instagram followers, $3.5M raised, and a clear sustainability story, this is a brand that Whole Foods buyers actively want to carry. Key opportunity: regional door expansion and deeper penetration in existing chains. The tinned fish premium category is underserved and growing.

data.email_subject: Fishwife — sustainably sourced tinned seafood for your specialty set
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

I'm writing to introduce Fishwife for your specialty seafood and protein category at Sprouts. Fishwife has become the leading premium tinned fish brand in the US, with enthusiastic press coverage from Bon Appétit, NYT, and Eater.

Why Fishwife at Sprouts:
• Sustainably sourced, MSC-certified seafood
• Bold, modern branding that photographs beautifully on shelf
• Strong Whole Foods velocity — natural channel proven
• Aligns with Sprouts' sustainability and quality positioning
• SRP $9–$14, premium but accessible

I'd love to put together a regional sell-in proposal. Would 15 minutes work in the next two weeks?

Best,
[Broker Name]

data.email_subject: Fishwife — the premium tinned seafood brand your shoppers are already asking for
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

Fishwife is one of the most talked-about specialty food brands in the US right now, and I believe it's a natural fit for Erewhon. Your shoppers already know the brand — Bon Appétit named it one of the best new food products of the year.

Fishwife for Erewhon:
• MSC-certified sustainable sourcing — matches Erewhon's values
• Extraordinary branding and packaging that performs on shelf and on social
• Premium SRP ($9–$14) with strong gross margin story
• DTC-first with growing specialty retail expansion
• No artificial ingredients, clean label

I'd love to walk through a detailed category fit analysis. Can we find 15 minutes?

Best,
[Broker Name]
